anti_claims: This organ JSON seed does not flip source authority away from core/organ_atlas.json and core/organ_registry.json.
Required paper/mechanism/code links prove declared structural references only, not runtime correctness or release readiness.
Selective concept, principle, axiom, and sibling-organ edges are not inferred from prose, specialty, family, or evidence class.
Absent selective organ edges are residual pressure, not evidence that no neighbours exist.
Generated markdown, graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omission_receipt.reason: Organ instance preserves public-safe atlas/registry fields. Required links resolve only when source ids or paths resolve; selective law/concept/principle edges remain residual unless source evidence names ids.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Populate missing paper/mechanism/code links from source evidence, then bind concept/principle/axiom/wires_to edges only when ids are named.

organ_payload.claim_ceiling: It authorizes only bounded public runtime validation over copied source-open pattern provenance bodies and body-free benchmark-integrity replay rows; it does not establish any benchmark or SWE-bench score, agent capability, provider execution, live-repo mutation, private/oracle/hidden-gold body access, product progress, or release readiness.

source_atlas_row.agent_gloss: An agent runs it to validate the exported benchmark-integrity bundle against copied public-safe macro pattern provenance bodies, source-artifact evidence refs, locked evaluator policy, recomputed public trace verdicts, and anti-gaming negatives. It emits body-free receipts only and never obtains, verifies, or asserts any benchmark or SWE-bench score, agent capability, provider result, live-repo mutation, or release authority.

source_atlas_row.display_name: Agent Benchmark Integrity Anti Gaming Replay
source_atlas_row.human_gloss: Checks a public benchmark-integrity example bundle that contains three copied public-safe macro pattern provenance bodies under source_artifacts. The organ verifies the source-module manifest digests, requires each replay row to cite those copied source artifacts, recomputes pass/quarantine verdicts from contamination, file-access, and locked-evaluator spans, and rejects common gaming attempts such as peeking at hidden answers, training on the test set, exposing the oracle patch, cherry-picking the best of many tries, or asserting a score. It still does not run real bug fixes or claim any benchmark score.

mechanism_refs.edge_justification: The organ's runtime module, benchmark-integrity fixture receipts, exported bundle source-module manifest, public trace recomputation, and anti-gaming negative cases validate body-free benchmark-claim boundary checks without asserting benchmark scores, agent capability, provider execution, product progress, or release readiness.

source_atlas_row.wiring_note: binds only to the shared kernel + evidence/authority spine (private_state_scan, receipts, schemas) plus digest-verified copied macro-pattern provenance bodies
